questions: Is the patient experiencing an acute painful situation or chronic pain?
Does the patient have cervical spondylosis? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have lumbar spondylosis? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing severe pain that disturbs sleep? (Yes/No)
Has the patient been receiving conservative treatment for more than 2 weeks without improvement? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing severe restriction of neck or back movements? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have sciatic pain? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have constitutional symptoms? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have neurological symptoms with back or neck pain? (Yes/No)
